title: arenaria tetraquetra var. frigida
intro: Arenaria tetraquetra var. frigida, also known as the cold Arctic white sandwort, is a plant species that belongs to the carnation family and is native to Arctic and alpine regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The cold Arctic white sandwort has been used to treat various health issues, such as skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its potential health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Arenaria tetraquetra var. frigida can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it has also been used in traditional medicine as a tincture or salve.
